hypothesis: MLB's above-random Brier is driven by a single overconfident bucket
method: Recompute MLB selected-outcome Brier from live /api/calibration excluding the 60-65 confidence bucket (pred 0.625, actual 0.300, n=30, +32.5pts)
result: CONFIRMED — removing one bucket flips MLB below the 0.25 random line. Overconfidence concentrated in 60-65% picks (which are the ones promoted to users). Engine-wide check: ALL 60-65 bucket also +10pts, so the slope issue is systemic, not MLB-only.
disposition: diagnostic; actionable fix queued (cap MLB near pickem / fix sigmoid slope) pending DB-backed validation

hypothesis: MLS home-field Elo bonus (55) is too high vs EPL (40) and causes home-favorite overconfidence; lowering MLS to ~40-45 would improve calibration
method: Adversarial verification against lib/elo.ts, factors/base.ts, probability.ts, and live calibration buckets
result: REJECTED/DISCARDED — 6 independent refutations: (1) mis-cited a comment from unused ratings/elo.ts not live lib/elo.ts; (2) MLS>EPL home edge is empirically sourced (ASA ~58-60% home wins) and both already below spec; (3) EPL signed bias (-12.0) is LARGER than MLS (+4.4); (4) metric is selected-outcome, cannot isolate home asymmetry; (5) cited buckets within noise (n~29, CI +/-18pt); (6) historical-Elo data leak makes signal untrustworthy for retuning a sourced constant.
disposition: DEAD IDEA — do not re-test. Small-sample overfitting trap. Retuning a sourced constant on leaky, noisy data would violate the anti-overfit spine.

hypothesis: Top Picks ships distrusted picks because the no-strict-pick fallback (pool=sportGames) drops all quality gates
change: routes/games.ts: pool fallback -> sportGames.filter(isRelaxedTopPickEligible); shared passesTopPickQualityGates(game,minConf); relaxed floor 53 keeps clean leans, still rejects blocked/low-data/tossup/reliability picks
verification: backend typecheck ok; full suite 435 pass; updated gamesNarrativeSanitizer.test (clean lean surfaced, blocked/below-floor excluded); live sweep below-floor count consistent with floor=53
disposition: SHIPPED on branch (Deepak-authorized). Clears post-deploy; pre-deploy live still shows old picks.

hypothesis: qa:predictions:live is unreliable: stale 2.10.0 version pin aborts it, and an exact-string audit-warning check yields 37 tennis false-positives
change: predictionInvariantSweep.ts: pin 2.11.0; STORED_PREGAME_WARNING_REGEX accepts final|start; floor 53
verification: live sweep no longer aborts on version; issueCount 93 -> 12; all 37 tennis 'missing audit warning' false-positives eliminated; NHL 55.8 clean lean no longer flagged
disposition: SHIPPED on branch. Remaining 12 are live below-floor/blocked top-picks cleared by the games.ts fix post-deploy.

hypothesis: Self-learning calibration is always-on with no off-switch or A/B; operational risk with no rollback short of revert
change: env.ts SELF_LEARNING_CALIBRATION_ENABLED flag; isSelfLearningCalibrationEnabled() (default ON); gated the single call site in newEngineAdapter.runNewEnginePrediction
verification: backend typecheck ok; selfLearningCalibration.test pass; default preserves shipped behavior
disposition: SHIPPED on branch (kill-switch only). Raw-probability column to break the feedback loop is DEFERRED (needs Prisma migration + DB).

hypothesis: Capping MLB confidence near pickem / fixing the engine-wide 60-65 sigmoid slope improves calibration
verification: cannot run out-of-sample backtest locally (no DATABASE_URL)
disposition: DEFERRED — promotion gate requires out-of-sample proof it helps MLB without regressing other leagues. Pre-existing & already live, so not shipping it does not make production worse. Next run with DB.

hypothesis: Elo+HFA shrunk pre-logistic causes systemic under-confidence; entering Elo at full scale + factors as additive adjustments fixes it
change: index.ts sumRatingDelta(): flag ENGINE_FULL_SCALE_RATING (default OFF). Full-scale: totalRatingDelta = eloBase + Σ(non-rating available factor.homeDelta*weight)
abMethod: 90-day ESPN replay, NBA/MLB/NHL n=150 each, flag OFF vs ON
result: NET WIN: fixes NBA under-confidence (conf now matches acc), helps NHL, improves overall Brier/logloss. Small MLB regression (-2pt acc, +0.002 brier) — expected (baseball Elo weak); to be recovered by #4 MLB shrink.
disposition: KEEP flag-gated (default OFF). Proven for NBA/NHL. Enable by default only after #4 recovers MLB and per-league check passes.

hypothesis: A magnitude soft-cap on MLB reads >60% + regressing noisy L10 form recovers the MLB regression from #2
change: index.ts MLB softCapDelta(70 Elo,0.4) + base.ts MLB formDelta*0.5, both under ENGINE_FULL_SCALE_RATING
abMethod: 90-day replay MLB n=150, OFF vs #2 vs #2+#4
result: DISCARDED — did NOT clear the gate. The replay cannot reproduce the LIVE 60-65 anti-predictive bucket (replay MLB conf rarely >60% so the soft-cap barely fires; the L10 regression removed slightly-useful replay signal). Hand-tuning MLB against data that doesn't show the problem = overfitting. REVERTED both parts.
disposition: DEAD as a hand-tune. MLB's real fix = data-driven per-league recalibration map (#5) on the raw-probability column (#3), validated on live production data. Do not re-attempt a hand-tuned MLB shrink without live validation.

hypothesis: #2 net-improves across leagues, not just NBA/NHL
abMethod: 90-day ESPN replay, --sports all (NBA/MLB/NHL n150; MLS48 IPL19 EPL7 cold-Elo), flag OFF vs ON
result: CLEARS GATE. #2 improves EVERY league's Brier except MLB (lone within-noise regression). Overall Brier 0.483→0.475, confidence now tracks accuracy (53.9→58.5 vs acc 60.6). MLB's weak-Elo regression slated for data-driven #5.
disposition: KEEP. Flag-gated (ENGINE_FULL_SCALE_RATING, default OFF). Recommend enabling in production after Deepak reviews. MLB fix via #5 (raw column #3 + recalibration).

hypothesis: net_rating/pitcher/goalie/injury/rest are in totalRatingDelta already; removing their redundant margin re-applications in buildScoreModel improves the projected score
change: simulation.ts: gate 5 factor-derived margin shifts behind v3 (keep trend/venue sim-only + all total/environment adjustments)
abMethod: 90-day replay NBA/MLB/NHL, #2-only vs #2+#9, compare score MAE
result: DISCARDED — did NOT clear the gate. Removing the shifts made projected margin SLIGHTLY WORSE across all three leagues (marginMae up; NHL acc -2). The shifts are theoretically redundant but the score-model constants were tuned AROUND them, so removing de-tunes the model. Reverted simulation.ts.
disposition: DEAD as a blind removal. If revisited, the whole score model (margin shifts + profile constants) must be re-tuned together and validated, not surgically removed. Lower priority than accuracy.

hypothesis: Tennis 40% rating_diff is dead weight (no player-Elo pipeline); reclaiming it to the ranking signal improves tennis calibration
change: currentEngineHistoricalReplay.ts: ADD tennis support (ATP+WTA, tournament→round→match, curatedRank, ranked-vs-ranked, set-based winner). base.ts+flags.ts: #11 behind ENGINE_TENNIS_RANK_RECLAIM (default OFF), tennis rating_diff marked unavailable → weight reallocates to ranking/form
abMethod: NEW tennis backtest, ranked-vs-ranked n=184, #2 on both arms, reclaim OFF vs ON
result: CLEARS THE GATE. Brier and logLoss both improve; accuracy unchanged (it sharpens confidence, doesn't change the pick). Tennis-gated → zero effect on other leagues. Supersedes the earlier reverted #11 (which failed only because tennis couldn't be measured — now it can).
disposition: KEEP. Committed 6e0922b, pushed. Prod-enable BLOCKED pending Deepak's explicit OK for ENGINE_TENNIS_RANK_RECLAIM (permission guard). Also: replay tennis (with rolled/cold player Elo) ≈ 62-65% ≈ live — confirms ranking carries tennis and seeding a real player-Elo pipeline is the larger future lever.
